description: Deep history and regionContractCard instances tied to real geographic and archival data, with high CIC/MDI and dense archival opacity. Used as a history substrate for PCG and spectral queries.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Vault may contain explicit historical and horror narratives; enforce access controls and Dead-Ledger governance externally.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All regionContractCard artifacts must include a schemaRef pointing to schemas/contracts/region-contract-card-v1.json.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include objectKind, tier, targetRepo, targetPath, and routingSpineRef for deterministic routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests targeting this repo must resolve routes via spine/hpc-routing-spine-v1.json.

authoringHints.summary: Use this T2-vault for deep region history and invariant bands. Seeds and events in other repos should reference these region cards via IDs.
aiBehavior: Only generate regionContractCard artifacts in this repo.
Never generate seeds or events here; route those to Atrocity-Seeds or Spectral-Foundry as defined by the routing spine.
Assume high CIC and AOS; treat all content as sensitive and non-public.
